arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer theory emerges amid Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyokeres decision
arts.sum: Arsenal will already be three-quarters of the way to completing the signing of a centre-forward for the summer transfer window, believes club legend Martin Keown, who also gave his verdict between Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyokeres. I don’t know if he’s got the necessary pace," was Keown's honest verdict as he looked towards Gyokeres' international teammate.

arts.ttl: Controversial penalty costs Arsenal at Everton
arts.sum: Highlights from the Premier League match between Everton and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes feelings clear on controversial Arsenal penalty decision
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta saw his Arsenal side held to a draw by Everton on Saturday, but the Gunners boss pinned the blame for the frustrating result on referee Darren England

arts.ttl: Arsenal's next trip to Merseyside will now include final Liverpool humiliation
arts.sum: Arsenal face the humiliating prospect of travelling to Liverpool for their clash on May 11 with the Reds already Premier League champions after dropping points against Everton on Saturday

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sent clear Arsenal warning before Champions League clash - 'Don't discount' - football.london
arts.sum: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown has warned against counting Mikel Arteta's squad out of their Champions League quarter-final tie against Real Madrid. "I get it, Real Madrid turn up at the business end of the season," the pundit told TNT sports ahead of Arsenal's Premier League draw with Everton on Saturday lunchtime.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: QUICK Osimhen deal, Arsenal Zubimendi HIJACK, De Bruyne to Saudi
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: QUICK Osimhen deal, Arsenal Zubimendi HIJACK, De Bruyne to Saudi Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Victor Osimhen, Martin Zubimendi and Kevin de Bruyne .

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans react to the prospect of Jakub Kiwior starting against Real Madrid after his heroics at Everton
arts.sum: Arsenal were left reeling by confirmation that Gabriel Magalhaes has suffered a season-ending injury. Gabriel sustained a hamstring injury during Tuesday night’s Premier League meeting...

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal transfer takes biggest twist yet as Andrea Berta answer given
arts.sum: Arsenal have expressed a desire to secure Gyokeres' services - and Berta has made that one of his first acts since becoming the club's new sporting director. Viktor Gyokeres has said 'yes' to Andrea Berta and is keen to join Arsenal this summer - it has been claimed.

arts.ttl: Arsenal player ratings as Kiwior passes test, Arteta given Real Madrid decision
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard gave Arsenal the lead after a transition attack from the Gunners saw Raheem Sterling run clear and lay it to the Belgian, who unleashed a left-footed low effort into the bottom-right corner. He didn't need more than a second chance, however, as after a pass from Sterling, the Belgian slammed a low shot into the bottom right corner.
